hero_description: Readya is a platform that easily converts any text into audio.
feature_ai_desc: Short, clear summaries. Only the essential information with quick access to key ideas
feature_voice_desc: Adjust reading speed, choose voice tone, and highlight text while listening
feature_save_desc: Access information on the go, use bookmarks and mark important sections
feature_listen_desc: Short, clear summaries. Only the essential information with quick access to key ideas
feature_download_desc: Save audio files for offline listening. Listen without internet connection
testimonial_1_text: Working with large volumes of study materials has become much easier with Readya. Listening to text allows me to manage my time more efficiently.
testimonial_2_text: In my workflow, I often need to go through a large number of documents. Readya helps make this process more flexible and efficient.
testimonial_3_text: Managing time effectively is important during exam preparation. Readya allows me to listen to study materials anytime.

what_is_readya.a: Readya is an AI-powered platform that converts Georgian text into natural, high-quality audio.

why_use_readya.a: Readya is designed for students, professionals, and businesses who want to listen to text, save time, and consume information more efficiently.

how_to_work.a: Simply paste text or upload a file, choose a voice, and the system will automatically convert it into audio within seconds.

what_file_types.q: What file types can I use?
what_file_types.a: You can use text-based files such as PDF, DOCX, or directly paste text into the platform.

what_languages.q: What languages is Readya available in?
what_languages.a: Currently, Readya is optimized for the Georgian language, with more languages planned in the future.

can_use_for_study.q: Can I use it for studying?
can_use_for_study.a: Yes, Readya is perfect for studying — you can listen to lectures, articles, and notes anytime.

why_readya.a: Readya provides a fast, simple, and high-quality way to listen to text, helping you save time and boost productivity.

hero.title: Make reading, learning, and working easier — anytime, anywhere!
hero.description: Readya gives you a simple and accessible way to consume information. Read with your ears. Listen to text. Improve comprehension and stay productive in your daily life.
